name: Thousand Island Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the ketchup, applesauce, sweet pickle relish, sugar (or Nutrasweet), and season salt.
2. Mix until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Gradually add the mayo to the mixture and stir until smooth.
4. Transfer the dressing to an airtight container.
5. Store in the refrigerator.
6. Use within 4 weeks.
